activated_rules.rule_name: Consignor allowed if name appears anywhere in the invoice
Goods description verification priority via article numbers
Quantity verification by existence in invoice
EU origin normalization – certificate 'EU' accepted if invoice shows member states

consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' matches 'Berg Propulsion Production AB' in invoice with abbreviation of legal form acceptable and presence confirmed in the invoice address block, with consistent country Sweden.

consignee.certificate_value: Lider Gemi Sanayi Turizm Nakliyat ve Ticaret Ltd.Sti.
consignee.invoice_value: Lider Gemi Sanayi Turizm Nakliyat ve Ticaret Ltd.Sti.
consignee.motivation: Consignee name perfectly matches in certificate and invoice at the primary 'Invoice to' field with country Turkiye consistent in both.

goods_description.certificate_value: One shipset of Twin Berg Propulsion Propeller Equipment type MPP690F with Accessories Part 2/2 - 21 cases One shipset of Single Berg Propulsion MTT113FP with Accessories Part 2/2 - 3 cases
goods_description.invoice_value: One shipset of Twin Berg Propulsion Propeller Equipment type MPP690F with Accessories Part 2/2 21 cases / 9.660,00 kg One shipset of Single Berg Propulsion MTT113FP with Accessories Part 2/2 3 cases / 1.480,00 kg
goods_description.motivation: Goods descriptions in certificate and invoice show clear and explicit match word-by-word with additional quantitative detail in invoice consistent with certificate, no semantic interpretation required.

quantity.motivation: Quantity stated as Gross Weight 11,140.00 kg and 24 cases in certificate is exactly matched by total quantity and weight in invoice with allowed normalization of decimal and formatting.

origin.motivation: Country of origin 'Sweden' in certificate explicitly appears with exact match text 'Country of origin: Sweden' in invoice.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All control points (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, origin) explicitly match without ambiguity or need for interpretation.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer och dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
